role: Inbound gRPC adapter — Protocol Buffers + gRPC Spring Boot Starter

packages.infra.api.grpc.service: gRPC service implementations (*GrpcService) — extends generated ImplBase, no extra interface
packages.infra.api.grpc.mapper: MapStruct mappers with default methods — proto builder ↔ Core Domain / Command
packages.infra.api.grpc.handler: @GrpcAdvice — maps core exceptions to gRPC Status codes
packages.infra.api.grpc.proto: Generated Protocol Buffer message + service stub classes (build-time)
